title: Build a Bird Feeder from Scrap Wood
body: A simple platform feeder with a roof. Birds find it within a day. Watch them through the kitchen window all winter.

source.label: Popular Mechanics, 1937 (verify per issue); Boys' Life

bands: Bird seed (sunflower seeds bring the most variety)
